text:
Dear Customer,

We detected unusual activity on your account. To protect your funds, we need you to confirm your identity immediately.

Please click the link below to verify your account information:
Verify Now

Failure to do so within 24 hours will result in temporary suspension of your account.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

— PayPal Security Team

From: security@bank-notice.com
To: you@example.com
Subject: Urgent: Account suspension — Action required within 24 hours

Dear Customer,

We detected suspicious activity on your AIB account and have temporarily restricted access. To restore full access, please verify your identity immediately by clicking the link below and completing the verification form: 

Verify your account: http://bank-verify-security.com/confirm

Failure to verify within 24 hours will result in permanent account suspension.

If you did not attempt to sign in, please ignore this message or contact our support team.

Sincerely,
AIB Security Team 

Attachment: Account-Verification.docx

Hello,
We detected suspicious activity on your account and will suspend it within 24 hours unless you verify your identity. Verify now: [malicious link].
If you do not verify within 24 hours your access will be permanently restricted.
— Security Team

Subject: Action required: Update your payment information
Dear Customer,
We were unable to process your recent payment. Please update your billing details within 48 hours to avoid service interruption: [update link].
If you believe this is an error, reply to this message with your invoice number.
— Billing Dept.

URGENT ALERT FROM BANK OF MONEY!!!🚨

DEAR CUSTOMER,
YOUR ACCOUNT IS BEING HACKED BY A CRIMINAL RIGHT NOW!!!
SEND US YOUR FULL NAME, CARD NUMBER, PASSWORD, AND MOTHER’S MAIDEN NAME IMMEDIATELY TO SAVE YOUR MONEY!!!
CLICK HERE → [totally-legit-security-bank.ru]
FAILURE TO DO SO WILL RESULT IN PERMANENT LOSS OF ALL FUNDS!!!
THANK YOU,
— THE BANK OF MONEY SECURITIES DEPARTMENT TEAM

⚠️ URGENT NOTICE ⚠️
Your account has been TEMPORARILY LOCKED due to suspicious activity!
Please confirm your ID immediately at [verify-now-securelogin.biz] or your account will be TERMINATED in 2 hours!!
— “Security Department”

Hi Sarah,

Your March 2025 account statement for Everyday Checking (•••• 2345) is now available. We’ve attached a PDF copy for your records. Summary:

Opening balance: €2,150.00

Closing balance: €1,987.34

Total debits: €412.66

Total credits: €250.00

If you’d like to view more details, please sign in to your account using our official website or mobile app — do not click links in unexpected emails. To go to your account, open your browser and type https://www.examplebank.com
 or use the Example Bank mobile app.

If you didn’t request this statement or see any suspicious transactions, call our support team at +353 1 234 5678 (Mon–Fri, 8:00–18:00) or reply to this message and we’ll investigate.

Thanks,
Rachel O’Neill

If you’d like to view more details, please sign in to your account using our official website or mobile app — do not click links in unexpected emails. To go to your account, open your browser and type https://www.examplebank.com
 or use the Example Bank mobile app.

Hi Jamie,

Thanks for shopping with us! We’ve received your order and it’s now being processed.

Order summary

Wireless Keyboard × 1 — €39.99

Shipping: Standard (3–5 business days)

Total: €42.49

Delivery address:
21 Oakview Terrace
Dublin 8, Ireland

You can track your order or update delivery preferences at any time by signing in to your account at https://www.techcorner.ie
.

We’ll email you again once your order ships.

Thanks for choosing TechCorner!

Hi Alex,

Great news — your order from BookNook.ie has shipped!

Delivery details

Carrier: DHL

Tracking number: DHL1234567

Estimated delivery: Tuesday, Nov 5, 2025

You can follow your package’s journey anytime through our official site:
https://www.dhl.com/track

If you have questions about your order, reply to this email or reach us at support@booknook.ie
.

Thanks for choosing BookNook, and happy reading!

— The BookNook Team
BookNook.ie | +353 1 678 2345

Subject: Urgent: Verify your account now
Hello,
We detected suspicious activity on your account and will suspend it within 24 hours unless you verify your identity. Verify now: [malicious link].
If you do not verify within 24 hours your access will be permanently restricted.
— Security Team

Dear Customer,

We have noticed suspicious activity on your online banking account. For your protection, we have temporarily restricted access until we can confirm your identity.

Please verify your information immediately to restore full access:
👉 https://secure-bankalert.com/verify-account

If you do not complete verification within 24 hours, your account may be permanently suspended.

Thank you for your prompt attention,
Online Security Department

Dear User,

We’ve detected suspicious sign-in activity on your Microsoft account from an unrecognized device. For your safety, your account access will be temporarily suspended unless you verify your identity within 24 hours.

Details of the sign-in attempt:

Location: Frankfurt, Germany

IP Address: 178.92.34.110

Browser: Chrome on Windows 10

Time: November 5, 2025, 08:12 AM (UTC)

If this was not you, please confirm your account ownership immediately.

👉 Verify My Account Now

Failure to complete this verification may result in permanent account suspension and loss of access to your emails, OneDrive, and Teams data.

Security Tips from Microsoft:

Never share your password with anyone.

Always ensure you log in from a secure connection.

If you have any questions, contact our support team at support@m1crosoft-security.com
.

Thank you for helping us keep your account secure.

Best regards,
The Microsoft Account Protection Team
Microsoft Corporation © 2025. All rights reserved.

Hellocustomer,

We detected multiple failed login attempts on your company account. For security reasons, your account has been temporarily limited. To restore access, please verify your credentials now:

https://example.com/security/verify-account

Please complete verification within 12 hours to avoid service interruption.

Thank you,
IT Support — Example Corporation

Hello Maria,

This is a reminder that we’ll be performing a scheduled VPN upgrade on Wednesday, Nov 12 from 22:00 to 23:00 GMT. During this window you may experience brief connectivity interruptions — no action is required on your part.

For details and status updates visit our IT status page: https://status.yourcompany.com/maintenance/nov12

If you have concerns, reply to this message or contact the IT Service Desk at +44 20 5555 1234 (ext. 210).

Thanks,
J. O’Connor
IT Service Desk — YourCompany

Purchasing Team,

Your purchase order PO-5587 has been approved. Please review the attached purchase order and confirm shipment.

Review PO: https://example.com/po/PO-5587

Attachment: PO-5587.pdf

Regards,
Acme Supplies

Hi Sarah,

We were unable to process your bank transfer because your bank details do not match our records. Please confirm the last 4 digits of your account now so we can ensure timely payment:

Confirm payroll details: https://example.com/hr/confirm-pay

If you have any questions, reply to this message or contact Payroll.

— Payroll Services

Hello Maria,

This is a reminder that we’ll be performing a scheduled VPN upgrade on Wednesday, Nov 12 from 22:00 to 23:00 GMT. During this window you may experience brief connectivity interruptions — no action is required on your part.

Subject: Urgent: Your account will be suspended in 24 hours
From: “Bank Support” <security@boi-secure-alerts.com
>
To: you@example.com

Hello Customer,

We detected unusual activity on your account. To avoid immediate suspension, you must verify your information within 24 hours.

Please confirm your details here:
👉 http://example.com/verify-login
 (short link previously: hxxp://bit.ly/2ABCD12)

We also attached an Invoice.pdf with the transaction in question.
If you do not act now, your online banking access will be revoked.

Thank you,
Account Security Team
Bank of Ireland (ID: BOI-784239)

Subject: Your monthly account statement is now available
From: Bank of Ireland <noreply@bankofireland.com
>
To: you@example.com

Dear [Your Name],

Your October 2025 account statement is now available in your secure online banking portal.

To view it, please:

Go to https://www.bankofireland.com

Log in directly using your usual credentials.

For your security, we will never ask for passwords, PINs, or card details by email.

Thank you for banking with us,
Bank of Ireland Online Services

Subject: 🚨 Urgent: Your Account Has Been Suspended

From: “Account Security Team” security@paypalsecure-alert.com

Body:
Dear Customer,

We detected unusual activity in your PayPal account and have temporarily suspended it for your protection.

To restore access, please verify your information immediately by clicking the link below:
👉 Verify Your Account Now

Failure to complete verification within 24 hours will result in permanent account suspension.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
PayPal Security Team
Subject: Urgent: Your Amazon account has been temporarily suspended

[SIMULATION — DO NOT SEND]
From: "Customer Support" <support@example-payments.com>
To: employee@company.local
Subject: [SIMULATION] Urgent: Verify your company payment details

Hello Employee,

We could not process a recent payment for your company account. To avoid service interruption, please verify your billing information immediately.

Click here to verify now:
Verify your account -> https://example-payments.verify-account-check.com/confirm

If you did not initiate this, please ignore this message.

Thanks,
Customer Support
example-payments.com

Hi Aimee,

Just wanted to share a quick update on the project. We’ve finished the initial design phase, and the development team will start implementing features on Monday. I’ll send over the full timeline once I’ve incorporated everyone’s feedback.

Let me know if you have any questions or need anything clarified.

Hi Aimee,

Just wanted to share a quick update on the project. We’ve finished the initial design phase, and the development team will start implementing features on Monday. I’ll send over the full timeline once I’ve incorporated everyone’s feedback.

Let me know if you have any questions or need anything clarified.

ubject: URGENT: Verify Your Account Immediately To Avoid Suspension

From: "Security Alert" <no-reply-secure@not-real-support.com>

Body:

Dear Customer,

We detected unusual activity on your account and, for your safety, we will suspend it within 24 hours unless you verify your information.

To keep your account active, please confirm your details by following the secure link below:

https://secure-login.example.com/verify?session=8347fh3498hf (FAKE LINK FOR TRAINING ONLY)

Once you log in and confirm your identity, this alert will be removed and your account will remain active.

Failure to verify your account may result in permanent suspension.

Thank you for your immediate attention,
Account Security Team

Subject: Your April Invoice from BrightCloud Hosting

From: Billing Team <billing@brightcloudhosting.com>

Body:

Hi Alex,

Thanks for using BrightCloud Hosting.

Your invoice for April 2025 is now available in your account.  
To view or download it, please log in directly to our website:

1. Go to https://brightcloudhosting.com
2. Click “Sign In” in the top-right corner
3. Navigate to “Billing > Invoices”

For your security, we will never ask you to reply with your password or payment details by email.

If you have any questions about this invoice, just reply to this message or reach us at support@brightcloudhosting.com.

Best regards,  
Maya Rivera  
Billing Team  
BrightCloud Hosting  
https://brightcloudhosting.com

ubject: Urgent: Your Bank of Northstar Account Has Been Suspended

From: Bank of Northstar Support <security@bnorthstar-secure.com
>
To: you@example.com

Dear Customer,

We have detected unusual activity on your Bank of Northstar account. For your security, your online access has been temporarily suspended.

To restore full access, you must verify your account information within 24 hours or your account may be permanently closed.

Please click the secure link below to continue:

👉 Verify your account now:
http://bnorthstar-secure.com/login/verify-user-294812

During this verification process we will ask you to confirm:

Full name

Date of birth

Debit card number and PIN

Social Security Number

Failure to complete this verification may result in permanent restriction of your account.

Thank you for your prompt attention,
Bank of Northstar Security Team
© 2025 Bank of Northstar. All rights reserved.

Typical indicators this is not phishing (your detector should ideally mark this as safe):

normal conversational tone

no urgent threats or pressure

no suspicious links

realistic company email address

specific context (meeting, room, project)

no request for passwords or personal information
